## Description
Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the [code style guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style)
- [ ] I have run `shellcheck` on all modified `.sh` files
- [ ] I have compiled all Swift runners without errors
- [ ] I have tested in the correct [execution context](CONTRIBUTING.md#context-boundaries) (host vs. guest)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages) format

## Execution Context
- [ ] Changes in `host/` — tested on macOS host
- [ ] Changes in `guest/nixos/` — tested inside NixOS VM
- [ ] Changes in `guest/macos/` — tested inside macOS VM
- [ ] Documentation only — no runtime changes

## Testing Notes
Describe how you tested these changes, or note if VM testing was not possible.
